name: ARP Redshift Law with Bounded Oscillatory Steering
equation: z(t) = z_h*(1 - exp(-gamma*t))*(1 - epsilon*cos(omega*t + phi)),  with 0 <= epsilon < 1
description: Nonnegative redshift growth with a bounded oscillatory modulation: retains monotone envelope while enabling controlled oscillatory steering.
source: RDM3DC / PR Root Guide (Phase-Lift + Adaptive-π + ARP/AIN thread)
evidence: Reduces to base ARP redshift when epsilon -> 0
